# Agent Core Map & Routing Protocol

> The single source of truth for this machine.
> Edit this file; run the beacon sync script to regenerate all beacons.

## Host Profile

- Machine: fixture-host
- Knowledge layer: ON

## Architectural Overview

This environment uses a 3-layer structure for agent context.

## Available Rooms

| Room | Path | Purpose |
|------|------|---------|
| Research | <HOME>/rooms/research/ | Literature review, data gathering, analysis |
| Writing | <HOME>/rooms/writing/ | Drafting, editing, long-form documents |

## Active Projects

| Project | Path | Status |
|---------|------|--------|
| example-project | <HOME>/workspace/example-project/ | Active |

## Per-Area Constraints

- **Research**: All claims cited.
- **Writing**: Consistent style.

## Core Directives

1. Use the compaction workflow.
2. Never traverse outside the environment root.
